Action: Business Issuer creates a deferred credential offer; Wallet collects the offer and retrieves the transaction ID
Data:
- Deferred credential offer deeplink
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Credential management ID
- Transaction ID from offer collection
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves transaction ID; credential management entry created in PENDING state

Action: Business Issuer updates the credential data and transitions the credential management state to READY
Data:
- Credential management ID
- Credential data: average_grade, name, type
- UpdateCredentialStatusRequestType.READY
- Issuer management API call
Expected Result: Credential management state successfully updated to READY; credential data stored

Action: Wallet retrieves the credential using the transaction ID from the deferred flow
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves SD-JWT credential with unbound claims

Action: Business Verifier creates verification request and Wallet provides valid presentation; Verifier validates the credential
Data:
- Verification request deeplink
- Wallet presentation (SD-JWT)
- Verification endpoint
- Issuer DID
Expected Result: Wallet presentation accepted; credential successfully verified; credential management status updated to ISSUED
